revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:September 5 (old lunar calendar)]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of September 5 (old lunar calendar)]]</includeonly>

'''旧暦9月5日'''は[[旧暦]][[9月 (旧暦)|9月]]の5日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]]である。
== できごと == * [[用明天皇]]元年（[[585年]]_月_日） - 欽明天皇の第四子・橘豊日皇子が即位し第31代・[[用明天皇]]に * [[永享]]元年（[[1429年]]_月_日） - 永享に改元 * [[明治]]4年（[[1871年]]_月_日） - 館県・弘前県・七戸県・八戸県・黒石県・斗南県を統合して弘前県に。現在の[[青森県]]の県域が確定
== 誕生日 ==
== 忌日 == * [[弘治]]3年（[[1557年]]_月_日） - [[後奈良天皇]]、105代[[天皇]]（* [[1496年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{msg:旧暦360日}} *前日[[9月4日 (旧暦)|9月4日]] 翌日[[9月6日 (旧暦)|9月6日]] - 前月[[8月5日 (旧暦)|8月5日]] 翌月[[10月5日 (旧暦)|10月5日]] *新暦[[9月5日]]
{{msg:stub}}

== できごと == * [[用明天皇]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[585年]][[10月3日]]） - [[欽明天皇]]の第四子・橘豊日皇子が即位し第31代・[[用明天皇]]に * [[永享]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1429年]][[10月3日]]） - [[後花園天皇]]の代始めのため[[正長]]より永享に[[改元]] * [[安政]]5年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1858年]][[10月11日]]） - [[安政の大獄]]による捕縛開始 * [[明治]]4年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1871年]][[10月18日]]） - 館県・弘前県・七戸県・八戸県・黒石県・斗南県を統合して弘前県に。現在の[[青森県]]の県域が確定
== 誕生日 == * [[弘化]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1846年]][[10月24日]]） - [[雨宮敬次郎]]、実業家（* [[1911年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[元弘]]元年/[[元徳]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1331年]][[10月7日]]） - [[足利貞氏]]、[[武将]]（* [[1273年]]） * [[弘治 (日本)|弘治]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1557年]][[9月27日]]） - [[後奈良天皇]]、105代[[天皇]]（* [[1496年]]） * [[天保]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1836年]][[10月14日]]） - [[最上徳内]]、[[江戸時代]]中後期の[[探検家]]（* [[1754年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|4|9|6|8|5|10|9|0905}}

== 忌日 == * [[元弘]]元年/[[元徳]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1331年]][[10月7日]]） - [[足利貞氏]]、[[武将]]（* [[1273年]]） * [[弘治 (日本)|弘治]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1557年]][[9月27日]]） - [[後奈良天皇]]、105代[[天皇]]（* [[1496年]]） * [[天保]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1836年]][[10月14日]]） - [[最上徳内]]、[[江戸時代]]中後期の[[探検家]]（* [[1754年]]）

== できごと == * [[用明天皇]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[585年]][[10月3日]]） - [[欽明天皇]]の第四子・橘豊日皇子が即位し第31代・[[用明天皇]]に * [[永享]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1429年]][[10月3日]]） - [[後花園天皇]]の代始めのため[[正長]]より永享に[[改元]] * [[安政]]5年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1858年]][[10月11日]]） - [[安政の大獄]]による捕縛開始 * [[明治]]4年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1871年]][[10月18日]]） - [[館県]]・[[弘前県]]・[[七戸県]]・[[盛岡藩#八戸藩|八戸県]]・[[黒石県]]・[[斗南県]]を統合して弘前県に。現在の[[青森県]]の県域が確定
== 誕生日 == * [[弘化]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1846年]][[10月24日]]） - [[雨宮敬次郎]]、実業家（* [[1911年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[元弘]]元年/[[元徳]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1331年]][[10月7日]]） - [[足利貞氏]]、[[武将]]（* [[1273年]]） * [[弘治 (日本)|弘治]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1557年]][[9月27日]]） - [[後奈良天皇]]、105代[[天皇]]（* [[1496年]]） * [[天保]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1836年]][[10月14日]]） - [[最上徳内]]、[[江戸時代]]中後期の[[探検家]]（* [[1754年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|4|9|6|8|5|10|9|0905}}
[[Category:japanese lunar calendar]][[ja:9月5日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]] [[Category:pages needing attribution]]

{{旧暦9月}} '''旧暦9月5日'''（きゅうれきくがついつか）は[[9月 (旧暦)|旧暦9月]]の5日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]]である。
== できごと == * [[用明天皇]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[585年]][[10月3日]]） - [[欽明天皇]]の第四子・橘豊日皇子が即位し第31代・[[用明天皇]]に * [[永享]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1429年]][[10月3日]]） - [[後花園天皇]]の代始めのため[[正長]]より永享に[[改元]] * [[安政]]5年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1858年]][[10月11日]]） - [[安政の大獄]]による捕縛開始 * [[明治]]4年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1871年]][[10月18日]]） - [[館県]]・[[弘前県]]・[[七戸県]]・[[盛岡藩#八戸藩|八戸県]]・[[黒石県]]・[[斗南県]]を統合して弘前県に。現在の[[青森県]]の県域が確定
== 誕生日 == * [[弘化]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1846年]][[10月24日]]） - [[雨宮敬次郎]]、実業家（* [[1911年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[元弘]]元年/[[元徳]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1331年]][[10月7日]]） - [[足利貞氏]]、[[武将]]（* [[1273年]]） * [[弘治 (日本)|弘治]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1557年]][[9月27日]]） - [[後奈良天皇]]、105代[[天皇]]（* [[1496年]]） * [[天保]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1836年]][[10月14日]]） - [[最上徳内]]、[[江戸時代]]中後期の[[探検家]]（* [[1754年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|4|9|6|8|5|10|9|0905}}
[[Category:japanese lunar calendar]][[ja:9月5日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]] [[Category:pages needing attribution]]

== 誕生日 == * [[弘化]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1846年]][[10月24日]]） - [[雨宮敬次郎]]、実業家（* [[1911年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[元弘]]元年/[[元徳]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1331年]][[10月7日]]） - [[足利貞氏]]、[[武将]]（* [[1273年]]） * [[弘治 (日本)|弘治]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1557年]][[9月27日]]） - [[後奈良天皇]]、105代[[天皇]]（* [[1496年]]） * [[天保]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1836年]][[10月14日]]） - [[最上徳内]]、[[江戸時代]]中後期の[[探検家]]（* [[1754年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|4|9|6|8|5|10|9|0905}}
[[Category:japanese lunar calendar]][[ja:9月5日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]]

revision.comment: idk what haoppened but removing and re-adding the template
Moving from [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]] to [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
adding boilerplate intro to all the days
Text replacement - "六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]]" to "六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]][[Category:先勝]]"
Text replacement - "旧暦}}" to "旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}"

revision.text:
'''September 5 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month MONTHY of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.
==OVERVIEW== {{Lunar September}} ''September 5 (Old Lunar Calendar)<!--Lunar September5-->きゅうれきくがついつか）は[[9月 (旧暦)|Lunar September]]の5日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]][[Category:先勝]]である。
== できごと == * [[用明天皇]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[585年]][[10月3日]]） - [[欽明天皇]]の第四子・橘豊日皇子が即位し第31代・[[用明天皇]]に * [[永享]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1429年]][[10月3日]]） - [[後花園天皇]]の代始めのため[[正長]]より永享に[[改元]] * [[安政]]5年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1858年]][[10月11日]]） - [[安政の大獄]]による捕縛開始 * [[明治]]4年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1871年]][[10月18日]]） - [[館県]]・[[弘前県]]・[[七戸県]]・[[盛岡藩#八戸藩|八戸県]]・[[黒石県]]・[[斗南県]]を統合して弘前県に。現在の[[青森県]]の県域が確定
== 誕生日 == * [[弘化]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1846年]][[10月24日]]） - [[雨宮敬次郎]]、実業家（* [[1911年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[元弘]]元年/[[元徳]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1331年]][[10月7日]]） - [[足利貞氏]]、[[武将]]（* [[1273年]]） * [[弘治 (日本)|弘治]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1557年]][[9月27日]]） - [[後奈良天皇]]、105代[[天皇]]（* [[1496年]]） * [[天保]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1836年]][[10月14日]]） - [[最上徳内]]、[[江戸時代]]中後期の[[探検家]]（* [[1754年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|4|9|6|8|5|10|9|0905}}
[[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[ja:9月5日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:Lunar September]] {{citation needed}}
{{citation needed}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunar Months}} [[Category:先勝]]

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:not Butsumetsu]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:not Butsumetsu]] marking all the pages that are not butsumetsu so I can use process of elimination to tag all Butsumetsu pages using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

== できごと == * [[用明天皇]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[585年]][[10月3日]]） - [[欽明天皇]]の第四子・橘豊日皇子が即位し第31代・[[用明天皇]]に * [[永享]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1429年]][[10月3日]]） - [[後花園天皇]]の代始めのため[[正長]]より永享に[[改元]] * [[安政]]5年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1858年]][[10月11日]]） - [[安政の大獄]]による捕縛開始 * [[明治]]4年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1871年]][[10月18日]]） - [[館県]]・[[弘前県]]・[[七戸県]]・[[盛岡藩#八戸藩|八戸県]]・[[黒石県]]・[[斗南県]]を統合して弘前県に。現在の[[青森県]]の県域が確定
== 誕生日 == * [[弘化]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1846年]][[10月24日]]） - [[雨宮敬次郎]]、実業家（* [[1911年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[元弘]]元年/[[元徳]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1331年]][[10月7日]]） - [[足利貞氏]]、[[武将]]（* [[1273年]]） * [[弘治 (日本)|弘治]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1557年]][[9月27日]]） - [[後奈良天皇]]、105代[[天皇]]（* [[1496年]]） * [[天保]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1836年]][[10月14日]]） - [[最上徳内]]、[[江戸時代]]中後期の[[探検家]]（* [[1754年]]）

== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|4|9|6|8|5|10|9|0905}}

--> == Events == * [[用明天皇]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[585年]][[10月3日]]） - [[欽明天皇]]の第四子・橘豊日皇子が即位し第31代・[[用明天皇]]に * [[永享]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1429年]][[10月3日]]） - [[後花園天皇]]の代始めのため[[正長]]より永享に[[改元]] * [[安政]]5年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1858年]][[10月11日]]） - [[安政の大獄]]による捕縛開始 * [[明治]]4年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1871年]][[10月18日]]） - [[館県]]・[[弘前県]]・[[七戸県]]・[[盛岡藩#八戸藩|八戸県]]・[[黒石県]]・[[斗南県]]を統合して弘前県に。現在の[[青森県]]の県域が確定
== Births == * [[弘化]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1846年]][[10月24日]]） - [[雨宮敬次郎]]、実業家（* [[1911年]]）
== Deaths == * [[元弘]]元年/[[元徳]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1331年]][[10月7日]]） - [[足利貞氏]]、[[武将]]（* [[1273年]]） * [[弘治 (日本)|弘治]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1557年]][[9月27日]]） - [[後奈良天皇]]、105代[[天皇]]（* [[1496年]]） * [[天保]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1836年]][[10月14日]]） - [[最上徳内]]、[[江戸時代]]中後期の[[探検家]]（* [[1754年]]）
== Commemorations ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|4|9|6|8|5|10|9|0905}}

revision.text:
[[sn:September 5 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 9월 5일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月5日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 5일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初五]] [[zh:九月初五]] [[en:draft:September 5 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar September}} '''September 5''' is the 5th day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Yōmyō Tennō|ja|用明天皇}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|585|ja|585}} {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}}） – The fourth son of {{ill|Kinmei Tennō|ja|欽明天皇}}, {{ill|Tachibana Toyohihi-no-ōji|ja|橘豊日皇子}}, ascended the throne as the 31st {{ill|Yōmyō Tennō|ja|用明天皇}}. * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1429|ja|1429}} {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}}） – To mark the beginning of the reign of {{ill|Go-Kagami Tennō|ja|後花園天皇}}, the era was changed from {{ill|Shōchō|ja|正長}} to {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享}}. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}}5年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1858|ja|1858}} {{ill|October 11|ja|10月11日}}） – The arrest of members of the {{ill|Sonzōha|ja|尊攘派}} began as part of the {{ill|Ansei no Daigoku|ja|安政の大獄}}. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}}4年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871}} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日}}） – The prefectures of {{ill|Tateno|ja|館県}}, {{ill|Hirosaki|ja|弘前県}}, {{ill|Shichinohe|ja|七戸県}}, {{ill|Hachinohe|ja|八戸県}}, {{ill|Kuroishi|ja|黒石県}}, and {{ill|Tonami|ja|斗南県}} were merged to form {{ill|Hirosaki Prefecture|ja|弘前県}}, thereby defining the modern boundaries of {{ill|Aomori|ja|青森県}}.
== Births == * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}}3年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1846|ja|1846}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日}}） – {{ill|Amemiya Keijirō|ja|雨宮敬次郎}}, an entrepreneur († {{ill|1911|ja|1911}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘}} 1st year/{{ill|Gentoku|ja|元徳}}3年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1331|ja|1331}} {{ill|October 7|ja|10月7日}}） – {{ill|Ashikaga Sadatsuru|ja|足利貞氏}}, a military commander (* {{ill|1273|ja|1273}}). * {{ill|Kōji (Japan)|ja|弘治}}3年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1557|ja|1557}} {{ill|September 27|ja|9月27日}}） – {{ill|Go-Nara Tennō|ja|後奈良天皇}}, the 105th emperor (* {{ill|1496|ja|1496}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}}7年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1836|ja|1836}} {{ill|October 14|ja|10月14日}}） – {{ill|Saijō Tokunai|ja|最上徳内}}, an explorer of late Edo (* {{ill|1754|ja|1754}}).

== Events == * {{ill|Yōmyō Tennō|ja|用明天皇}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|585|ja|585}} {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}}） – The fourth son of {{ill|Kinmei Tennō|ja|欽明天皇}}, {{ill|Tachibana Toyohihi-no-ōji|ja|橘豊日皇子}}, ascended the throne as the 31st {{ill|Yōmyō Tennō|ja|用明天皇}}. * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1429|ja|1429}} {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}}） – To mark the beginning of the reign of {{ill|Go-Kagami Tennō|ja|後花園天皇}}, the era was changed from {{ill|Shōchō|ja|正長}} to {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享}}. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}}5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1858|ja|1858}} {{ill|October 11|ja|10月11日}}） – The arrest of members of the {{ill|Sonzōha|ja|尊攘派}} began as part of the {{ill|Ansei no Daigoku|ja|安政の大獄}}. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}}4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871}} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日}}） – The prefectures of {{ill|Tateno|ja|館県}}, {{ill|Hirosaki|ja|弘前県}}, {{ill|Shichinohe|ja|七戸県}}, {{ill|Hachinohe|ja|八戸県}}, {{ill|Kuroishi|ja|黒石県}}, and {{ill|Tonami|ja|斗南県}} were merged to form {{ill|Hirosaki Prefecture|ja|弘前県}}, thereby defining the modern boundaries of {{ill|Aomori|ja|青森県}}.
== Births == * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}}3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1846|ja|1846}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日}}） – {{ill|Amemiya Keijirō|ja|雨宮敬次郎}}, an entrepreneur († {{ill|1911|ja|1911}}).

== Events == * {{ill|Yōmyō Tennō|ja|用明天皇}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|585|ja|585}} {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}} ） – The fourth son of {{ill|Kinmei Tennō|ja|欽明天皇}} , {{ill|Tachibana Toyohihi-no-ōji|ja|橘豊日皇子}} , ascended the throne as the 31st {{ill|Yōmyō Tennō|ja|用明天皇}} . * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1429|ja|1429}} {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}} ） – To mark the beginning of the reign of {{ill|Go-Kagami Tennō|ja|後花園天皇}} , the era was changed from {{ill|Shōchō|ja|正長}} to {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享}} . * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1858|ja|1858}} {{ill|October 11|ja|10月11日}} ） – The arrest of members of the {{ill|Sonzōha|ja|尊攘派}} began as part of the {{ill|Ansei no Daigoku|ja|安政の大獄}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871}} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日}} ） – The prefectures of {{ill|Tateno|ja|館県}} , {{ill|Hirosaki|ja|弘前県}} , {{ill|Shichinohe|ja|七戸県}} , {{ill|Hachinohe|ja|八戸県}} , {{ill|Kuroishi|ja|黒石県}} , and {{ill|Tonami|ja|斗南県}} were merged to form {{ill|Hirosaki Prefecture|ja|弘前県}} , thereby defining the modern boundaries of {{ill|Aomori|ja|青森県}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1846|ja|1846}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日}} ） – {{ill|Amemiya Keijirō|ja|雨宮敬次郎}} , an entrepreneur († {{ill|1911|ja|1911}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘}} 1st year/{{ill|Gentoku|ja|元徳}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1331|ja|1331}} {{ill|October 7|ja|10月7日}} ） – {{ill|Ashikaga Sadatsuru|ja|足利貞氏}} , a military commander (* {{ill|1273|ja|1273}} ). * {{ill|Kōji (Japan)|ja|弘治}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1557|ja|1557}} {{ill|September 27|ja|9月27日}} ） – {{ill|Go-Nara Tennō|ja|後奈良天皇}} , the 105th emperor (* {{ill|1496|ja|1496}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 7th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1836|ja|1836}} {{ill|October 14|ja|10月14日}} ） – {{ill|Saijō Tokunai|ja|最上徳内}} , an explorer of late Edo (* {{ill|1754|ja|1754}} ).

[[sn:September 5 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 5일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月5日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 5일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初五]] [[zh:九月初五]] [[en:draft:September 5 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 5''' is the 5th day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Yōmyō Tennō|ja|用明天皇}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|585|ja|585}} {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}} ） – The fourth son of {{ill|Kinmei Tennō|ja|欽明天皇}} , {{ill|Tachibana Toyohihi-no-ōji|ja|橘豊日皇子}} , ascended the throne as the 31st {{ill|Yōmyō Tennō|ja|用明天皇}} . * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1429|ja|1429}} {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}} ） – To mark the beginning of the reign of {{ill|Go-Kagami Tennō|ja|後花園天皇}} , the era was changed from {{ill|Shōchō|ja|正長}} to {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享}} . * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1858|ja|1858}} {{ill|October 11|ja|10月11日}} ） – The arrest of members of the {{ill|Sonzōha|ja|尊攘派}} began as part of the {{ill|Ansei no Daigoku|ja|安政の大獄}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871}} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日}} ） – The prefectures of {{ill|Tateno|ja|館県}} , {{ill|Hirosaki|ja|弘前県}} , {{ill|Shichinohe|ja|七戸県}} , {{ill|Hachinohe|ja|八戸県}} , {{ill|Kuroishi|ja|黒石県}} , and {{ill|Tonami|ja|斗南県}} were merged to form {{ill|Hirosaki Prefecture|ja|弘前県}} , thereby defining the modern boundaries of {{ill|Aomori|ja|青森県}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1846|ja|1846}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日}} ） – {{ill|Amemiya Keijirō|ja|雨宮敬次郎}} , an entrepreneur († {{ill|1911|ja|1911}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘}} 1st year/{{ill|Gentoku|ja|元徳}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1331|ja|1331}} {{ill|October 7|ja|10月7日}} ） – {{ill|Ashikaga Sadatsuru|ja|足利貞氏}} , a military commander (* {{ill|1273|ja|1273}} ). * {{ill|Kōji (Japan)|ja|弘治}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1557|ja|1557}} {{ill|September 27|ja|9月27日}} ） – {{ill|Go-Nara Tennō|ja|後奈良天皇}} , the 105th emperor (* {{ill|1496|ja|1496}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 7th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1836|ja|1836}} {{ill|October 14|ja|10月14日}} ） – {{ill|Saijō Tokunai|ja|最上徳内}} , an explorer of late Edo (* {{ill|1754|ja|1754}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|4|9|6|8|5|10|9|0905}}

== Deaths == * {{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘}} 1st year/{{ill|Gentoku|ja|元徳}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1331|ja|1331}} {{ill|October 7|ja|10月7日}} ） – {{ill|Ashikaga Sadatsuru|ja|足利貞氏}} , a military commander (* {{ill|1273|ja|1273}} ). * {{ill|Kōji (Japan)|ja|弘治}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1557|ja|1557}} {{ill|September 27|ja|9月27日}} ） – {{ill|Go-Nara Tennō|ja|後奈良天皇}} , the 105th emperor (* {{ill|1496|ja|1496}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 7th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1836|ja|1836}} {{ill|October 14|ja|10月14日}} ） – {{ill|Saijō Tokunai|ja|最上徳内}} , an explorer of late Edo (* {{ill|1754|ja|1754}} ).
== See Also ==

[[sn:September 5 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 5일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月5日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 5일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初五]] [[zh:九月初五]] [[en:draft:September 5 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 5''' is the 5th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Yōmyō Tennō|ja|用明天皇}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|585|ja|585}} {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}} ） – The fourth son of {{ill|Kinmei Tennō|ja|欽明天皇}} , {{ill|Tachibana Toyohihi-no-ōji|ja|橘豊日皇子}} , ascended the throne as the 31st {{ill|Yōmyō Tennō|ja|用明天皇}} . * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1429|ja|1429}} {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}} ） – To mark the beginning of the reign of {{ill|Go-Kagami Tennō|ja|後花園天皇}} , the era was changed from {{ill|Shōchō|ja|正長}} to {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享}} . * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1858|ja|1858}} {{ill|October 11|ja|10月11日}} ） – The arrest of members of the {{ill|Sonzōha|ja|尊攘派}} began as part of the {{ill|Ansei no Daigoku|ja|安政の大獄}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871}} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日}} ） – The prefectures of {{ill|Tateno|ja|館県}} , {{ill|Hirosaki|ja|弘前県}} , {{ill|Shichinohe|ja|七戸県}} , {{ill|Hachinohe|ja|八戸県}} , {{ill|Kuroishi|ja|黒石県}} , and {{ill|Tonami|ja|斗南県}} were merged to form {{ill|Hirosaki Prefecture|ja|弘前県}} , thereby defining the modern boundaries of {{ill|Aomori|ja|青森県}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1846|ja|1846}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日}} ） – {{ill|Amemiya Keijirō|ja|雨宮敬次郎}} , an entrepreneur († {{ill|1911|ja|1911}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘}} 1st year/{{ill|Gentoku|ja|元徳}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1331|ja|1331}} {{ill|October 7|ja|10月7日}} ） – {{ill|Ashikaga Sadatsuru|ja|足利貞氏}} , a military commander (* {{ill|1273|ja|1273}} ). * {{ill|Kōji (Japan)|ja|弘治}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1557|ja|1557}} {{ill|September 27|ja|9月27日}} ） – {{ill|Go-Nara Tennō|ja|後奈良天皇}} , the 105th emperor (* {{ill|1496|ja|1496}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 7th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1836|ja|1836}} {{ill|October 14|ja|10月14日}} ） – {{ill|Saijō Tokunai|ja|最上徳内}} , an explorer of late Edo (* {{ill|1754|ja|1754}} ).

revision.text:
[[sn:September 5 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 5일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月5日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 5일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初五]] [[zh:九月初五]] [[en:draft:September 5 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 5''' is the 5th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Yōmyō Tennō|ja|用明天皇}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|585|ja|585}} {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}} ） – The fourth son of {{ill|Kinmei Tennō|ja|欽明天皇}} , {{ill|Tachibana Toyohihi-no-ōji|ja|橘豊日皇子}} , ascended the throne as the 31st {{ill|Yōmyō Tennō|ja|用明天皇}} . * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1429|ja|1429}} {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}} ） – To mark the beginning of the reign of {{ill|Go-Kagami Tennō|ja|後花園天皇}} , the era was changed from {{ill|Shōchō|ja|正長}} to {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享}} . * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1858|ja|1858}} {{ill|October 11|ja|10月11日}} ） – The arrest of members of the {{ill|Sonzōha|ja|尊攘派}} began as part of the {{ill|Ansei no Daigoku|ja|安政の大獄}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871}} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日}} ） – The prefectures of {{ill|Tateno|ja|館県}} , {{ill|Hirosaki|ja|弘前県}} , {{ill|Shichinohe|ja|七戸県}} , {{ill|Hachinohe|ja|八戸県}} , {{ill|Kuroishi|ja|黒石県}} , and {{ill|Tonami|ja|斗南県}} were merged to form {{ill|Hirosaki Prefecture|ja|弘前県}} , thereby defining the modern boundaries of {{ill|Aomori|ja|青森県}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1846|ja|1846}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日}} ） – {{ill|Amemiya Keijirō|ja|雨宮敬次郎}} , an entrepreneur († {{ill|1911|ja|1911}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘}} 1st year/{{ill|Gentoku|ja|元徳}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1331|ja|1331}} {{ill|October 7|ja|10月7日}} ） – {{ill|Ashikaga Sadatsuru|ja|足利貞氏}} , a military commander (* {{ill|1273|ja|1273}} ). * {{ill|Kōji (Japan)|ja|弘治}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1557|ja|1557}} {{ill|September 27|ja|9月27日}} ） – {{ill|Go-Nara Tennō|ja|後奈良天皇}} , the 105th emperor (* {{ill|1496|ja|1496}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 7th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1836|ja|1836}} {{ill|October 14|ja|10月14日}} ） – {{ill|Saijō Tokunai|ja|最上徳内}} , an explorer of late Edo (* {{ill|1754|ja|1754}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|4|9|6|8|5|10|9|0905}}

== Deaths == * {{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘}} 1st year/{{ill|Gentoku|ja|元徳}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1331|ja|1331}} {{ill|October 7|ja|10月7日}} ） – {{ill|Ashikaga Sadatsuru|ja|足利貞氏}} , a military commander (* {{ill|1273|ja|1273}} ). * {{ill|Kōji (Japan)|ja|Kōji}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1557|ja|1557}} {{ill|September 27|ja|9月27日}} ） – {{ill|Go-Nara Tennō|ja|後奈良天皇}} , the 105th emperor (* {{ill|1496|ja|1496}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 7th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1836|ja|1836}} {{ill|October 14|ja|10月14日}} ） – {{ill|Saijō Tokunai|ja|最上徳内}} , an explorer of late Edo (* {{ill|1754|ja|1754}} ).

[[sn:September 5 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 5일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月5日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 5일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初五]] [[zh:九月初五]] [[en:draft:September 5 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 5''' is the 5th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Yōmyō Tennō|ja|Emperor Yōmei}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|585|ja|585}} {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}} ） – The fourth son of {{ill|Kinmei Tennō|ja|欽明天皇}} , {{ill|Tachibana Toyohihi-no-ōji|ja|橘豊日皇子}} , ascended the throne as the 31st {{ill|Yōmyō Tennō|ja|Emperor Yōmei}} . * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1429|ja|1429}} {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}} ） – To mark the beginning of the reign of {{ill|Go-Kagami Tennō|ja|後花園天皇}} , the era was changed from {{ill|Shōchō|ja|正長}} to {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享}} . * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1858|ja|1858}} {{ill|October 11|ja|10月11日}} ） – The arrest of members of the {{ill|Sonzōha|ja|Sonnō jōi faction}} began as part of the {{ill|Ansei no Daigoku|ja|安政の大獄}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871}} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日}} ） – The prefectures of {{ill|Tateno|ja|館県}} , {{ill|Hirosaki|ja|弘前県}} , {{ill|Shichinohe|ja|七戸県}} , {{ill|Hachinohe|ja|八戸県}} , {{ill|Kuroishi|ja|黒石県}} , and {{ill|Tonami|ja|斗南県}} were merged to form {{ill|Hirosaki Prefecture|ja|弘前県}} , thereby defining the modern boundaries of {{ill|Aomori|ja|青森県}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1846|ja|1846}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日}} ） – {{ill|Amemiya Keijirō|ja|雨宮敬次郎}} , an entrepreneur († {{ill|1911|ja|1911}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘}} 1st year/{{ill|Gentoku|ja|元徳}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1331|ja|1331}} {{ill|October 7|ja|10月7日}} ） – {{ill|Ashikaga Sadatsuru|ja|足利貞氏}} , a military commander (* {{ill|1273|ja|1273}} ). * {{ill|Kōji (Japan)|ja|Kōji}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1557|ja|1557}} {{ill|September 27|ja|9月27日}} ） – {{ill|Go-Nara Tennō|ja|後奈良天皇}} , the 105th emperor (* {{ill|1496|ja|1496}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 7th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1836|ja|1836}} {{ill|October 14|ja|10月14日}} ） – {{ill|Saijō Tokunai|ja|最上徳内}} , an explorer of late Edo (* {{ill|1754|ja|1754}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|4|9|6|8|5|10|9|0905}}

== Deaths == * {{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘}} 1st year/{{ill|Gentoku|ja|元徳}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1331|ja|1331}} {{ill|October 7|ja|10月7日}} ） – {{ill|Ashikaga Sadatsuru|ja|足利貞氏}} , a military commander (* {{ill|1273|ja|1273}} ). * {{ill|Kōji (Japan)|ja|Kōji}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1557|ja|1557}} {{ill|September 27|ja|9月27日}} ） – {{ill|Go-Nara Tennō|ja|後奈良天皇}} , the 105th emperor (* {{ill|1496|ja|1496}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 7th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1836|ja|1836}} {{ill|October 14|ja|10月14日}} ） – {{ill|Saijō Tokunai|ja|最上徳内}} , an explorer of late Edo (* {{ill|1754|ja|1754}} ).== See Also ==

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .

== Births == * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1846|ja|1846}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日}} ） – {{ill|Amemiya Keijirō|ja|雨宮敬次郎}} , an entrepreneur († {{ill|1911|ja|1911}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘}} 1st year/{{ill|Gentoku|ja|元徳}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1331|ja|1331}} {{ill|October 7|ja|10月7日}} ） – {{ill|Ashikaga Sadatsuru|ja|足利貞氏}} , a military commander (* {{ill|1273|ja|1273}} ). * {{ill|Kōji (Japan)|ja|Kōji}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1557|ja|1557}} {{ill|September 27|ja|9月27日}} ） – {{ill|Go-Nara Tennō|ja|後奈良天皇}} , the 105th emperor (* {{ill|1496|ja|1496}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 7th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1836|ja|1836}} {{ill|October 14|ja|10月14日}} ） – {{ill|Saijō Tokunai|ja|最上徳内}} , an explorer of late Edo (* {{ill|1754|ja|1754}} ). == See Also! ==

[[sn:September 5 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 5일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月5日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 5일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初五]] [[zh:九月初五]] [[en:draft:September 5 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 5''' is the 5th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Yōmyō Tennō|ja|Emperor Yōmei}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|585|ja|585}} {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}} ） – The fourth son of {{ill|Kinmei Tennō|ja|欽明天皇}} , {{ill|Tachibana Toyohihi-no-ōji|ja|橘豊日皇子}} , ascended the throne as the 31st {{ill|Yōmyō Tennō|ja|Emperor Yōmei}} . * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1429|ja|1429}} {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}} ） – To mark the beginning of the reign of {{ill|Go-Kagami Tennō|ja|後花園天皇}} , the era was changed from {{ill|Shōchō|ja|正長}} to {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享}} . * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1858|ja|1858}} {{ill|October 11|ja|10月11日}} ） – The arrest of members of the {{ill|Sonzōha|ja|Sonnō jōi faction}} began as part of the {{ill|Ansei no Daigoku|ja|安政の大獄}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871}} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日}} ） – The prefectures of {{ill|Tateno|ja|館県}} , {{ill|Hirosaki|ja|弘前県}} , {{ill|Shichinohe|ja|七戸県}} , {{ill|Hachinohe|ja|八戸県}} , {{ill|Kuroishi|ja|黒石県}} , and {{ill|Tonami|ja|斗南県}} were merged to form {{ill|Hirosaki Prefecture|ja|弘前県}} , thereby defining the modern boundaries of {{ill|Aomori|ja|青森県}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1846|ja|1846}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日}} ） – {{ill|Amemiya Keijirō|ja|雨宮敬次郎}} , an entrepreneur († {{ill|1911|ja|1911}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘}} 1st year/{{ill|Gentoku|ja|元徳}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1331|ja|1331}} {{ill|October 7|ja|10月7日}} ） – {{ill|Ashikaga Sadatsuru|ja|足利貞氏}} , a military commander (* {{ill|1273|ja|1273}} ). * {{ill|Kōji (Japan)|ja|Kōji}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1557|ja|1557}} {{ill|September 27|ja|9月27日}} ） – {{ill|Go-Nara Tennō|ja|後奈良天皇}} , the 105th emperor (* {{ill|1496|ja|1496}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 7th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1836|ja|1836}} {{ill|October 14|ja|10月14日}} ） – {{ill|Saijō Tokunai|ja|最上徳内}} , an explorer of late Edo (* {{ill|1754|ja|1754}} ).

== Deaths == * {{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘}} 1st year/{{ill|Gentoku|ja|元徳}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1331|ja|1331}} {{ill|October 7|ja|10月7日}} ） – {{ill|Ashikaga Sadatsuru|ja|足利貞氏}} , a military commander (* {{ill|1273|ja|1273}} ). * {{ill|Kōji (Japan)|ja|Kōji}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1557|ja|1557}} {{ill|September 27|ja|9月27日}} ） – {{ill|Go-Nara Tennō|ja|後奈良天皇}} , the 105th emperor (* {{ill|1496|ja|1496}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 7th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1836|ja|1836}} {{ill|October 14|ja|10月14日}} ） – {{ill|Saijō Tokunai|ja|最上徳内}} , an explorer of late Edo (* {{ill|1754|ja|1754}} ).

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .

== Births == * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1846|ja|1846}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日}} ） – {{ill|Amemiya Keijirō|ja|雨宮敬次郎}} , an entrepreneur († {{ill|1911|ja|1911}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘}} 1st year/{{ill|Gentoku|ja|元徳}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1331|ja|1331}} {{ill|October 7|ja|10月7日}} ） – {{ill|Ashikaga Sadatsuru|ja|足利貞氏}} , a military commander (* {{ill|1273|ja|1273}} ). * {{ill|Kōji (Japan)|ja|Kōji}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1557|ja|1557}} {{ill|September 27|ja|9月27日}} ） – {{ill|Go-Nara Tennō|ja|後奈良天皇}} , the 105th emperor (* {{ill|1496|ja|1496}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 7th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1836|ja|1836}} {{ill|October 14|ja|10月14日}} ） – {{ill|Saijō Tokunai|ja|最上徳内}} , an explorer of late Edo (* {{ill|1754|ja|1754}} ).

[[sn:September 5 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 5일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月5日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 5일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初五]] [[zh:九月初五]] [[en:draft:September 5 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 5''' is the 5th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Yōmyō Tennō|ja|Emperor Yōmei}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|585|ja|585}} {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}} ） – The fourth son of {{ill|Kinmei Tennō|ja|欽明天皇}} , {{ill|Tachibana Toyohihi-no-ōji|ja|橘豊日皇子}} , ascended the throne as the 31st {{ill|Yōmyō Tennō|ja|Emperor Yōmei}} . * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1429|ja|1429}} {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}} ） – To mark the beginning of the reign of {{ill|Go-Kagami Tennō|ja|後花園天皇}} , the era was changed from {{ill|Shōchō|ja|正長}} to {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享}} . * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1858|ja|1858}} {{ill|October 11|ja|10月11日}} ） – The arrest of members of the {{ill|Sonzōha|ja|Sonnō jōi faction}} began as part of the {{ill|Ansei no Daigoku|ja|安政の大獄}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871}} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日}} ） – The prefectures of {{ill|Tateno|ja|館県}} , {{ill|Hirosaki|ja|弘前県}} , {{ill|Shichinohe|ja|七戸県}} , {{ill|Hachinohe|ja|八戸県}} , {{ill|Kuroishi|ja|黒石県}} , and {{ill|Tonami|ja|斗南県}} were merged to form {{ill|Hirosaki Prefecture|ja|弘前県}} , thereby defining the modern boundaries of {{ill|Aomori|ja|青森県}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1846|ja|1846}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日}} ） – {{ill|Amemiya Keijirō|ja|雨宮敬次郎}} , an entrepreneur († {{ill|1911|ja|1911}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘}} 1st year/{{ill|Gentoku|ja|元徳}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1331|ja|1331}} {{ill|October 7|ja|10月7日}} ） – {{ill|Ashikaga Sadatsuru|ja|足利貞氏}} , a military commander (* {{ill|1273|ja|1273}} ). * {{ill|Kōji (Japan)|ja|Kōji}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1557|ja|1557}} {{ill|September 27|ja|9月27日}} ） – {{ill|Go-Nara Tennō|ja|後奈良天皇}} , the 105th emperor (* {{ill|1496|ja|1496}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 7th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1836|ja|1836}} {{ill|October 14|ja|10月14日}} ） – {{ill|Saijō Tokunai|ja|最上徳内}} , an explorer of late Edo (* {{ill|1754|ja|1754}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|4|9|6|8|5|10|9|0905}}

[[cdo:9 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初五]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 5''' is the 5th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September|12=draft|12=draft}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Yōmyō Tennō|ja|Emperor Yōmei|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|585|ja|585|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – The fourth son of {{ill|Kinmei Tennō|ja|欽明天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Tachibana Toyohihi-no-ōji|ja|橘豊日皇子|12=draft|12=draft}} , ascended the throne as the 31st {{ill|Yōmyō Tennō|ja|Emperor Yōmei|12=draft|12=draft}} . * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1429|ja|1429|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – To mark the beginning of the reign of {{ill|Go-Kagami Tennō|ja|後花園天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} , the era was changed from {{ill|Shōchō|ja|正長|12=draft|12=draft}} to {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享|12=draft|12=draft}} . * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1858|ja|1858|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 11|ja|10月11日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – The arrest of members of the {{ill|Sonzōha|ja|Sonnō jōi faction|12=draft|12=draft}} began as part of the {{ill|Ansei no Daigoku|ja|安政の大獄|12=draft|12=draft}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – The prefectures of {{ill|Tateno|ja|館県|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Hirosaki|ja|弘前県|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Shichinohe|ja|七戸県|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Hachinohe|ja|八戸県|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Kuroishi|ja|黒石県|12=draft|12=draft}} , and {{ill|Tonami|ja|斗南県|12=draft|12=draft}} were merged to form {{ill|Hirosaki Prefecture|ja|弘前県|12=draft|12=draft}} , thereby defining the modern boundaries of {{ill|Aomori|ja|青森県|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1846|ja|1846|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Amemiya Keijirō|ja|雨宮敬次郎|12=draft|12=draft}} , an entrepreneur († {{ill|1911|ja|1911|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year/{{ill|Gentoku|ja|元徳|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1331|ja|1331|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 7|ja|10月7日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Ashikaga Sadatsuru|ja|足利貞氏|12=draft|12=draft}} , a military commander (* {{ill|1273|ja|1273|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kōji (Japan)|ja|Kōji|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1557|ja|1557|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|September 27|ja|9月27日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Go-Nara Tennō|ja|後奈良天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 105th emperor (* {{ill|1496|ja|1496|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft|12=draft}} 7th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1836|ja|1836|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 14|ja|10月14日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Saijō Tokunai|ja|最上徳内|12=draft|12=draft}} , an explorer of late Edo (* {{ill|1754|ja|1754|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|4|9|6|8|5|10|9|0905}}
{{cdo:9 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)}} {{zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)}} {{zh-yue:九月初五}} {{zh:九月初五}}
{{cdo:9 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)}} {{zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)}} {{zh-yue:九月初五}} {{zh:九月初五}} {{cdo:9 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)}} {{zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)}} {{zh-yue:九月初五}} {{zh:九月初五}} ==References== {{reflist}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunisolar Months}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar September]] [[Category:Senshō]] [[Category:Days 5 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] [[Category:Lunisolar]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:return the see also]] [[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]] [[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]] }} [[sn:September 5 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 5일]] [[ja:9月5日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:九月初五]] [[en:draft:September 5 (Lunisolar)]]

== Deaths == * {{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year/{{ill|Gentoku|ja|元徳|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1331|ja|1331|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 7|ja|10月7日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Ashikaga Sadatsuru|ja|足利貞氏|12=draft|12=draft}} , a military commander (* {{ill|1273|ja|1273|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kōji (Japan)|ja|Kōji|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1557|ja|1557|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|September 27|ja|9月27日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Go-Nara Tennō|ja|後奈良天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 105th emperor (* {{ill|1496|ja|1496|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft|12=draft}} 7th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1836|ja|1836|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 14|ja|10月14日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Saijō Tokunai|ja|最上徳内|12=draft|12=draft}} , an explorer of late Edo (* {{ill|1754|ja|1754|12=draft|12=draft}} ).

revision.text:
{{旧暦9月}} '''旧暦9月5日'''（きゅうれきくがついつか）は[[9月 (旧暦)|旧暦9月]]の5日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]]である。
== できごと == * [[用明天皇]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[585年]][[10月3日]]） - [[欽明天皇]]の第四子・橘豊日皇子が即位し第31代・[[用明天皇]]に * [[永享]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1429年]][[10月3日]]） - [[後花園天皇]]の代始めのため[[正長]]より永享に[[改元]] * [[安政]]5年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1858年]][[10月11日]]） - [[安政の大獄]]による捕縛開始 * [[明治]]4年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1871年]][[10月18日]]） - [[館県]]・[[弘前県]]・[[七戸県]]・[[盛岡藩#八戸藩|八戸県]]・[[黒石県]]・[[斗南県]]を統合して弘前県に。現在の[[青森県]]の県域が確定
== 誕生日 == * [[弘化]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1846年]][[10月24日]]） - [[雨宮敬次郎]]、実業家（* [[1911年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[元弘]]元年/[[元徳]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1331年]][[10月7日]]） - [[足利貞氏]]、[[武将]]（* [[1273年]]） * [[弘治 (日本)|弘治]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1557年]][[9月27日]]） - [[後奈良天皇]]、105代[[天皇]]（* [[1496年]]） * [[天保]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1836年]][[10月14日]]） - [[最上徳内]]、[[江戸時代]]中後期の[[探検家]]（* [[1754年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|4|9|6|8|5|10|9|0905}}

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[9月5日 (旧暦)]] to [[September 5 (Lunisolar)]] without leaving a redirect: Bot: merge import
revision.text:

== できごと == * [[用明天皇]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[585年]][[10月3日]]） - [[欽明天皇]]の第四子・橘豊日皇子が即位し第31代・[[用明天皇]]に * [[永享]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1429年]][[10月3日]]） - [[後花園天皇]]の代始めのため[[正長]]より永享に[[改元]] * [[安政]]5年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1858年]][[10月11日]]） - [[安政の大獄]]による捕縛開始 * [[明治]]4年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1871年]][[10月18日]]） - [[館県]]・[[弘前県]]・[[七戸県]]・[[盛岡藩#八戸藩|八戸県]]・[[黒石県]]・[[斗南県]]を統合して弘前県に。現在の[[青森県]]の県域が確定
== 誕生日 == * [[弘化]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1846年]][[10月24日]]） - [[雨宮敬次郎]]、実業家（* [[1911年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[元弘]]元年/[[元徳]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1331年]][[10月7日]]） - [[足利貞氏]]、[[武将]]（* [[1273年]]） * [[弘治 (日本)|弘治]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1557年]][[9月27日]]） - [[後奈良天皇]]、105代[[天皇]]（* [[1496年]]） * [[天保]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1836年]][[10月14日]]） - [[最上徳内]]、[[江戸時代]]中後期の[[探検家]]（* [[1754年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|4|9|6|8|5|10|9|0905}}

revision.text:
{{Not to be confused with|September 5 (Lunisolar)}}<!--hatnote--> {{Not to be confused with|September 5}}<!--hatnote--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 5일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 5''' is the 5th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|qq=}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Yōmyō Tennō|ja|Emperor Yōmei|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yōmyō Tennō|qq=}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|585|ja|585|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/585|qq=}} [[:en:October 3|October 3]] ） – The fourth son of [[:en:Emperor Kinmei|Kinmei Tennō]] , {{ill|Tachibana Toyohihi-no-ōji|ja|橘豊日皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tachibana Toyohihi-no-ōji|qq=}} , ascended the throne as the 31st {{ill|Yōmyō Tennō|ja|Emperor Yōmei|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yōmyō Tennō|qq=}} . * [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|1429|ja|1429|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1429|qq=}} [[:en:October 3|October 3]] ） – To mark the beginning of the reign of [[:en:Emperor Go-Hanazono|Go-Kagami Tennō]] , the era was changed from [[:en:Shōchō|Shōchō]] to [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] . * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1858|ja|1858|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1858|qq=}} [[:en:October 11|October 11]] ） – The arrest of members of the {{ill|Sonzōha|ja|Sonnō jōi faction|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sonzōha|qq=}} began as part of the [[:en:Ansei Purge|Ansei no Daigoku]] . * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1871|ja|1871|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1871|qq=}} [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ） – The prefectures of {{ill|Tateno|ja|館県|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tateno|qq=}} , {{ill|Hirosaki|ja|弘前県|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hirosaki|qq=}} , {{ill|Shichinohe|ja|七戸県|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shichinohe|qq=}} , {{ill|Hachinohe|ja|八戸県|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachinohe|qq=}} , {{ill|Kuroishi|ja|黒石県|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuroishi|qq=}} , and {{ill|Tonami|ja|斗南県|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tonami|qq=}} were merged to form {{ill|Hirosaki Prefecture|ja|弘前県|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hirosaki Prefecture|qq=}} , thereby defining the modern boundaries of [[:en:Aomori Prefecture|Aomori]] .
== Births == * [[:en:Kōka|Kōka]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1846|ja|1846|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1846|qq=}} [[:en:October 24|October 24]] ） – [[:en:Keijiro Amemiya|Amemiya Keijirō]] , an entrepreneur († {{ill|1911|ja|1911|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1911|qq=}} ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 1st year/[[:en:Gentoku|Gentoku]] 3rd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|1331|ja|1331|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1331|qq=}} [[:en:October 7|October 7]] ） – {{ill|Ashikaga Sadatsuru|ja|足利貞氏|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Sadatsuru|qq=}} , a military commander (* {{ill|1273|ja|1273|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1273|qq=}} ). * {{ill|Kōji (Japan)|1=Kōji (Muromachi period)|2=ja|3=弘治 (日本)|lt=Kōji|4=ru|5=Кодзи (Муромати)|ja|Kōji|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōji (Japan)|1=Kōji (Muromachi period)|2=ja|3=弘治 (日本)|lt=Kōji|4=ru|5=Кодзи (Муромати)|qq=}} 3rd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|1557|ja|1557|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1557|qq=}} [[:en:September 27|September 27]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Go-Nara|Go-Nara Tennō]] , the 105th emperor (* {{ill|1496|ja|1496|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1496|qq=}} ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 7th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1836|ja|1836|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1836|qq=}} [[:en:October 14|October 14]] ） – [[:en:Mogami Tokunai|Saijō Tokunai]] , an explorer of late Edo (* {{ill|1754|ja|1754|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1754|qq=}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|4|9|6|8|5|10|9|0905|qq=}} {{cdo:9 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)|qq=}} {{zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)|qq=}} {{zh-yue:九月初五|qq=}} {{zh:九月初五|qq=}} {{cdo:9 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)|qq=}} {{zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)|qq=}} {{zh-yue:九月初五|qq=}} {{zh:九月初五|qq=}} {{cdo:9 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)|qq=}} {{zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)|qq=}} {{zh-yue:九月初五|qq=}} {{zh:九月初五|qq=}} ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
[[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初五]]
{{translated page|ja|9月5日 (旧暦)|version=83320750|comment=Imported full ja history}}

revision.text:
{{Not to be confused with|September 5|qq=September 5}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 5일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 5''' is the 5th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Yōmyō Tennō|ja|Emperor Yōmei|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yōmyō Tennō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|585|ja|585|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/585|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 500|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} [[:en:October 3|October 3]] ） – The fourth son of [[:en:Emperor Kinmei|Kinmei Tennō]] , {{ill|Tachibana Toyohihi-no-ōji|ja|橘豊日皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tachibana Toyohihi-no-ōji|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , ascended the throne as the 31st {{ill|Yōmyō Tennō|ja|Emperor Yōmei|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yōmyō Tennō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} . * [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|1429|ja|1429|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1429|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:October 3|October 3]] ） – To mark the beginning of the reign of [[:en:Emperor Go-Hanazono|Go-Kagami Tennō]] , the era was changed from [[:en:Shōchō|Shōchō]] to [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] . * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1858|ja|1858|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1858|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:October 11|October 11]] ） – The arrest of members of the {{ill|Sonzōha|ja|Sonnō jōi faction|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sonzōha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} began as part of the [[:en:Ansei Purge|Ansei no Daigoku]] . * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1871|ja|1871|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1871|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1000}} [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ） – The prefectures of {{ill|Tateno|ja|館県|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tateno|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 松前藩}} , {{ill|Hirosaki|ja|弘前県|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hirosaki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 青森県}} , {{ill|Shichinohe|ja|七戸県|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shichinohe|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 七戸藩}} , {{ill|Hachinohe|ja|八戸県|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachinohe|qq=}} , {{ill|Kuroishi|ja|黒石県|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuroishi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弘前藩}} , and {{ill|Tonami|ja|斗南県|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tonami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 会津藩}} were merged to form {{ill|Hirosaki Prefecture|ja|弘前県|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hirosaki Prefecture|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 青森県}} , thereby defining the modern boundaries of [[:en:Aomori Prefecture|Aomori]] .
== Births == * [[:en:Kōka|Kōka]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1846|ja|1846|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1846|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:October 24|October 24]] ） – [[:en:Keijiro Amemiya|Amemiya Keijirō]] , an entrepreneur († {{ill|1911|ja|1911|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1911|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1911 (曖昧さ回避)}} ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 1st year/[[:en:Gentoku|Gentoku]] 3rd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|1331|ja|1331|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1331|qq=}} [[:en:October 7|October 7]] ） – {{ill|Ashikaga Sadatsuru|ja|足利貞氏|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Sadatsuru|qq=}} , a military commander (* [[:en:1273|1273]] ). * [[:en:Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 3rd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|1557|ja|1557|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1557|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:September 27|September 27]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Go-Nara|Go-Nara Tennō]] , the 105th emperor (* {{ill|1496|ja|1496|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1496|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1000}} ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 7th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1836|ja|1836|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1836|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:October 14|October 14]] ） – [[:en:Mogami Tokunai|Saijō Tokunai]] , an explorer of late Edo (* {{ill|1754|ja|1754|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1754|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|4|9|6|8|5|10|9|0905|qq=}} {{cdo:9 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)|qq=}} {{zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)|qq=}} {{zh-yue:九月初五|qq=}} {{zh:九月初五|qq=}} {{cdo:9 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)|qq=}} {{zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)|qq=}} {{zh-yue:九月初五|qq=}} {{zh:九月初五|qq=}} {{cdo:9 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)|qq=}} {{zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)|qq=}} {{zh-yue:九月初五|qq=}} {{zh:九月初五|qq=}} ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
[[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初五]]
{{translated page|ja|9月5日 (旧暦)|version=83320750|comment=Imported full ja history}}

{{ill|Hirosaki|ja|弘前県|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hirosaki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 青森県}} , {{ill|Shichinohe|ja|七戸県|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shichinohe|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 七戸藩}} , redirects to 弘前藩}} , and {{ill|Tonami|ja|斗南県|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tonami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 会津藩}} were merged to form {{ill|Hirosaki Prefecture|Aomori]] .

{{Not to be confused with|September 5|qq=September 5}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 5일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 5''' is the 5th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Yōmyō Tennō|ja|Emperor Yōmei|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yōmyō Tennō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|585|ja|585|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/585|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 500|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} [[:en:October 3|October 3]] ） – The fourth son of [[:en:Emperor Kinmei|Kinmei Tennō]] , {{ill|Tachibana Toyohihi-no-ōji|ja|橘豊日皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tachibana Toyohihi-no-ōji|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , ascended the throne as the 31st {{ill|Yōmyō Tennō|ja|Emperor Yōmei|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yōmyō Tennō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} . * [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1429|1429]] [[:en:October 3|October 3]] ） – To mark the beginning of the reign of [[:en:Emperor Go-Hanazono|Go-Kagami Tennō]] , the era was changed from [[:en:Shōchō|Shōchō]] to [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] . * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1858|ja|1858|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1858|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:October 11|October 11]] ） – The arrest of members of the {{ill|Sonzōha|ja|Sonnō jōi faction|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sonzōha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} began as part of the [[:en:Ansei Purge|Ansei no Daigoku]] . * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1871|ja|1871|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1871|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1000}} [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ） – The prefectures of {{ill|Tateno|ja|館県|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tateno|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 松前藩}} , {{ill|Hirosaki|ja|弘前県|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hirosaki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 青森県}} , {{ill|Shichinohe|ja|七戸県|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shichinohe|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 七戸藩}} , redirects to 弘前藩}} , and {{ill|Tonami|ja|斗南県|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tonami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 会津藩}} were merged to form {{ill|Hirosaki Prefecture|ja|弘前県|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hirosaki Prefecture|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 青森県}} , thereby defining the modern boundaries of [[:en:Aomori Prefecture|Aomori]] .
== Births == * [[:en:Kōka|Kōka]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1846|ja|1846|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1846|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:October 24|October 24]] ） – [[:en:Keijiro Amemiya|Amemiya Keijirō]] , an entrepreneur († {{ill|1911|ja|1911|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1911|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1911 (曖昧さ回避)}} ).

revision.text:
{{Not to be confused with|September 5|qq=September 5}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 5일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 5''' is the 5th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Yōmyō Tennō|ja|Emperor Yōmei|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yōmyō Tennō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|585|ja|585|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/585|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 500|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} [[:en:October 3|October 3]] ） – The fourth son of [[:en:Emperor Kinmei|Kinmei Tennō]] , {{ill|Tachibana Toyohihi-no-ōji|ja|橘豊日皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tachibana Toyohihi-no-ōji|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , ascended the throne as the 31st {{ill|Yōmyō Tennō|ja|Emperor Yōmei|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yōmyō Tennō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} . * [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1429|1429]] [[:en:October 3|October 3]] ） – To mark the beginning of the reign of [[:en:Emperor Go-Hanazono|Go-Kagami Tennō]] , the era was changed from [[:en:Shōchō|Shōchō]] to [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] . * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1858|ja|1858|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1858|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:October 11|October 11]] ） – The arrest of members of the {{ill|Sonzōha|ja|Sonnō jōi faction|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sonzōha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} began as part of the [[:en:Ansei Purge|Ansei no Daigoku]] . * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1871|ja|1871|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1871|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1000}} [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ） – The prefectures of {{ill|Tateno|ja|館県|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tateno|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 松前藩}} , {{ill|Hirosaki|ja|弘前県|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hirosaki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 青森県}} , {{ill|Shichinohe|ja|七戸県|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shichinohe|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 七戸藩}} , {{ill|Hachinohe|ja|八戸県|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachinohe|qq=}} , {{ill|Kuroishi|ja|黒石県|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuroishi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弘前藩}} , and {{ill|Tonami|ja|斗南県|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tonami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 会津藩}} were merged to form {{ill|Hirosaki Prefecture|ja|弘前県|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hirosaki Prefecture|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 青森県}} , thereby defining the modern boundaries of [[:en:Aomori Prefecture|Aomori]] .
== Births == * [[:en:Kōka|Kōka]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1846|ja|1846|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1846|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:October 24|October 24]] ） – [[:en:Keijiro Amemiya|Amemiya Keijirō]] , an entrepreneur († {{ill|1911|ja|1911|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1911|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1911 (曖昧さ回避)}} ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 1st year/[[:en:Gentoku|Gentoku]] 3rd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1331|1331]] [[:en:October 7|October 7]] ） – {{ill|Ashikaga Sadatsuru|ja|足利貞氏|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Sadatsuru|qq=}} , a military commander (* [[:en:1273|1273]] ). * [[:en:Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 3rd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1557|1557]] [[:en:September 27|September 27]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Go-Nara|Go-Nara Tennō]] , the 105th emperor (* [[:en:1496|1496]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 7th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1836|ja|1836|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1836|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:October 14|October 14]] ） – [[:en:Mogami Tokunai|Saijō Tokunai]] , an explorer of late Edo (* [[:en:1754|1754]] ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|4|9|6|8|5|10|9|0905|qq=}} {{cdo:9 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)|qq=}} {{zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)|qq=}} {{zh-yue:九月初五|qq=}} {{zh:九月初五|qq=}} {{cdo:9 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)|qq=}} {{zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)|qq=}} {{zh-yue:九月初五|qq=}} {{zh:九月初五|qq=}} {{cdo:9 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)|qq=}} {{zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)|qq=}} {{zh-yue:九月初五|qq=}} {{zh:九月初五|qq=}} ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
[[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初五]]
{{translated page|ja|9月5日 (旧暦)|version=83320750|comment=Imported full ja history}}

{{Not to be confused with|September 5|qq=September 5}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 5일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 5''' is the 5th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Yōmyō Tennō|ja|Emperor Yōmei|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yōmyō Tennō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|585|ja|585|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/585|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 500|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} [[:en:October 3|October 3]] ） – The fourth son of [[:en:Emperor Kinmei|Kinmei Tennō]] , {{ill|Tachibana Toyohihi-no-ōji|ja|橘豊日皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tachibana Toyohihi-no-ōji|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , ascended the throne as the 31st {{ill|Yōmyō Tennō|ja|Emperor Yōmei|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yōmyō Tennō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} . * [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1429|1429]] [[:en:October 3|October 3]] ） – To mark the beginning of the reign of [[:en:Emperor Go-Hanazono|Go-Kagami Tennō]] , the era was changed from [[:en:Shōchō|Shōchō]] to [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] . * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1858|1858]] [[:en:October 11|October 11]] ） – The arrest of members of the {{ill|Sonzōha|ja|Sonnō jōi faction|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sonzōha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} began as part of the [[:en:Ansei Purge|Ansei no Daigoku]] . * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1871|ja|1871|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1871|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1000}} [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ） – The prefectures of {{ill|Tateno|ja|館県|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tateno|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 松前藩}} , {{ill|Hirosaki|ja|弘前県|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hirosaki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 青森県}} , {{ill|Shichinohe|ja|七戸県|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shichinohe|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 七戸藩}} , {{ill|Hachinohe|ja|八戸県|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachinohe|qq=}} , {{ill|Kuroishi|ja|黒石県|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuroishi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弘前藩}} , and {{ill|Tonami|ja|斗南県|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tonami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 会津藩}} were merged to form {{ill|Hirosaki Prefecture|ja|弘前県|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hirosaki Prefecture|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 青森県}} , thereby defining the modern boundaries of [[:en:Aomori Prefecture|Aomori]] .
== Births == * [[:en:Kōka|Kōka]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1846|1846]] [[:en:October 24|October 24]] ） – [[:en:Keijiro Amemiya|Amemiya Keijirō]] , an entrepreneur († {{ill|1911|ja|1911|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1911|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1911 (曖昧さ回避)}} ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 1st year/[[:en:Gentoku|Gentoku]] 3rd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1331|1331]] [[:en:October 7|October 7]] ） – {{ill|Ashikaga Sadatsuru|ja|足利貞氏|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Sadatsuru|qq=}} , a military commander (* [[:en:1273|1273]] ). * [[:en:Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 3rd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1557|1557]] [[:en:September 27|September 27]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Go-Nara|Go-Nara Tennō]] , the 105th emperor (* [[:en:1496|1496]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 7th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1836|1836]] [[:en:October 14|October 14]] ） – [[:en:Mogami Tokunai|Saijō Tokunai]] , an explorer of late Edo (* [[:en:1754|1754]] ).

members of the {{ill|Sonzōha|ja|Sonnō jōi faction|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sonzōha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} began as part of the [[:en:Ansei Purge|Ansei no Daigoku]] . * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ） – The prefectures of {{ill|Tateno|ja|館県|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tateno|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 松前藩}} , {{ill|Hirosaki|ja|弘前県|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hirosaki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 青森県}} , {{ill|Shichinohe|ja|七戸県|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shichinohe|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 七戸藩}} , {{ill|Hachinohe|ja|八戸県|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachinohe|qq=}} , {{ill|Kuroishi|ja|黒石県|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuroishi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弘前藩}} , and {{ill|Tonami|ja|斗南県|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tonami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 会津藩}} were merged to form {{ill|Hirosaki Prefecture|ja|弘前県|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hirosaki Prefecture|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 青森県}} , thereby defining the modern boundaries of [[:en:Aomori Prefecture|Aomori]] .
== Births == * [[:en:Kōka|Kōka]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1846|1846]] [[:en:October 24|October 24]] ） – [[:en:Keijiro Amemiya|Amemiya Keijirō]] , an entrepreneur († [[:en:1911|1911]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 1st year/[[:en:Gentoku|Gentoku]] 3rd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1331|1331]] [[:en:October 7|October 7]] ） – {{ill|Ashikaga Sadatsuru|ja|足利貞氏|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Sadatsuru|qq=}} , a military commander (* [[:en:1273|1273]] ). * [[:en:Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 3rd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1557|1557]] [[:en:September 27|September 27]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Go-Nara|Go-Nara Tennō]] , the 105th emperor (* [[:en:1496|1496]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 7th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1836|1836]] [[:en:October 14|October 14]] ） – [[:en:Mogami Tokunai|Saijō Tokunai]] , an explorer of late Edo (* [[:en:1754|1754]] ).

[[:en:585|585]] [[:en:October 3|October 3]] ） – The fourth son of [[:en:Emperor Kinmei|Kinmei Tennō]] , {{ill|Tachibana Toyohihi-no-ōji|ja|橘豊日皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tachibana Toyohihi-no-ōji|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , ascended the throne as the 31st {{ill|Yōmyō Tennō|ja|Emperor Yōmei|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yōmyō Tennō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} . * [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1429|1429]] [[:en:October 3|October 3]] ） – To mark the beginning of the reign of [[:en:Emperor Go-Hanazono|Go-Kagami Tennō]] , the era was changed from [[:en:Shōchō|Shōchō]] to [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] . * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1858|1858]] [[:en:October 11|October 11]] ） – The arrest of members of the {{ill|Sonzōha|ja|Sonnō jōi faction|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sonzōha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} began as part of the [[:en:Ansei Purge|Ansei no Daigoku]] . * {{ill|Tateno|ja|館県|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tateno|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 松前藩|1=Matsumae Domain|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q18669712}} , {{ill|Hirosaki|ja|弘前県|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hirosaki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 青森県|1=Aomori Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q71699}} , {{ill|Shichinohe|ja|七戸県|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shichinohe|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 七戸藩|1=Shichinohe Domain|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7884520}} , {{ill|Hachinohe|ja|八戸県|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachinohe|qq=|1=Hachinohe|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11391207}} , {{ill|Kuroishi|ja|黒石県|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuroishi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弘前藩|1=Hirosaki Domain|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q903555}} , and {{ill|Tonami|ja|斗南県|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tonami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 会津藩|1=Aizu Domain|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4389944}} were merged to form {{ill|Hirosaki Prefecture|ja|弘前県|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hirosaki Prefecture|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 青森県|1=Aomori Prefecture|comment=changed title based on == Births == * [[:en:Kōka|Kōka]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1846|1846]] [[:en:October 24|October 24]] ） – [[:en:Keijiro Amemiya|Amemiya Keijirō]] , an entrepreneur († [[:en:1911|1911]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 1st year/[[:en:Gentoku|Gentoku]] 3rd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1331|1331]] [[:en:October 7|October 7]] ） – {{ill|Ashikaga Sadatsuru|ja|足利貞氏|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Sadatsuru|qq=|1=Ashikaga Sadauji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11636829}} , a military commander (* [[:en:1273|1273]] ). * [[:en:Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 3rd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1557|1557]] [[:en:September 27|September 27]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Go-Nara|Go-Nara Tennō]] , the 105th emperor (* [[:en:1496|1496]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 7th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1836|1836]] [[:en:October 14|October 14]] ） – [[:en:Mogami Tokunai|Saijō Tokunai]] , an explorer of late Edo (* [[:en:1754|1754]] ).

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 5일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 5''' is the 5th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . Tennō|ja|Emperor Yōmei|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yōmyō Tennō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} . * [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] . * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1858|1858]] [[:en:October 11|October 11]] ） – The arrest of members of the Toyohihi-no-ōji|ja|橘豊日皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tachibana Toyohihi-no-ōji|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , ascended the throne as the 31st {{ill|Yōmyō [[:en:1429|1429]] [[:en:October 3|October 3]] ） – To mark the beginning of the reign of [[:en:Emperor Go-Hanazono|Go-Kagami Tennō]] , the era was changed from [[:en:Shōchō|Shōchō]] to [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] . * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1858|1858]] [[:en:October 11|October 11]] ） – The arrest of members of the {{ill|Sonzōha|ja|Sonnō jōi faction|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sonzōha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} began as part of the [[:en:Ansei Purge|Ansei no Daigoku]] . * {{ill|Kuroishi|ja|黒石県|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuroishi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弘前藩|1=Hirosaki Domain|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q903555}} , and == Births == * [[:en:Kōka|Kōka]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1846|1846]] [[:en:October 24|October 24]] ） – [[:en:Keijiro Amemiya|Amemiya Keijirō]] , an entrepreneur († [[:en:1911|1911]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 1st year/[[:en:Gentoku|Gentoku]] 3rd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1331|1331]] [[:en:October 7|October 7]] ） – {{ill|Ashikaga Sadatsuru|ja|足利貞氏|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Sadatsuru|qq=|1=Ashikaga Sadauji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11636829}} , a military commander (* [[:en:1273|1273]] ). * [[:en:Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 3rd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1557|1557]] [[:en:September 27|September 27]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Go-Nara|Go-Nara Tennō]] , the 105th emperor (* [[:en:1496|1496]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 7th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1836|1836]] [[:en:October 14|October 14]] ） – [[:en:Mogami Tokunai|Saijō Tokunai]] , an explorer of late Edo (* [[:en:1754|1754]] ).
