== Births == * [[:en:Kōka|Kōka]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1846|1846]] [[:en:October 24|October 24]] ） – [[:en:Keijiro Amemiya|Amemiya Keijirō]] , an entrepreneur († [[:en:1911|1911]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 1st year/[[:en:Gentoku|Gentoku]] 3rd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1331|1331]] [[:en:October 7|October 7]] ） – {{ill|Ashikaga Sadatsuru|ja|足利貞氏|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Sadatsuru|qq=|1=Ashikaga Sadauji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11636829}} , a military commander (* [[:en:1273|1273]] ). * [[:en:Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 3rd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1557|1557]] [[:en:September 27|September 27]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Go-Nara|Go-Nara Tennō]] , the 105th emperor (* [[:en:1496|1496]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 7th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1836|1836]] [[:en:October 14|October 14]] ） – [[:en:Mogami Tokunai|Saijō Tokunai]] , an explorer of late Edo (* [[:en:1754|1754]] ).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月5日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 5일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月初五]][[zh:九月初五]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840086]] Wikidata name: 5th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:14, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 5|qq=September 5}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 5일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 5''' is the 5th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Yōmyō Tennō|ja|Emperor Yōmei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yōmyō Tennō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:585|585]] [[:en:October 3|October 3]] ） – The fourth son of [[:en:Emperor Kinmei|Kinmei Tennō]] , {{ill|Tachibana Toyohihi-no-ōji|ja|橘豊日皇子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tachibana Toyohihi-no-ōji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , ascended the throne as the 31st {{ill|Yōmyō Tennō|ja|Emperor Yōmei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yōmyō Tennō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} . * [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1429|1429]] [[:en:October 3|October 3]] ） – To mark the beginning of the reign of [[:en:Emperor Go-Hanazono|Go-Kagami Tennō]] , the era was changed from [[:en:Shōchō|Shōchō]] to [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] . * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1858|1858]] [[:en:October 11|October 11]] ） – The arrest of members of the {{ill|Sonzōha|ja|Sonnō jōi faction|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sonzōha|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} began as part of the [[:en:Ansei Purge|Ansei no Daigoku]] . * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ） – The prefectures of {{ill|Tateno|ja|館県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tateno|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 松前藩|1=Matsumae Domain|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q18669712}} , {{ill|Hirosaki|ja|弘前県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hirosaki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 青森県|1=Aomori Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q71699}} , {{ill|Shichinohe|ja|七戸県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shichinohe|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 七戸藩|1=Shichinohe Domain|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7884520}} , {{ill|Hachinohe|ja|八戸県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachinohe|1=Hachinohe|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11391207}} , {{ill|Kuroishi|ja|黒石県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuroishi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弘前藩|1=Hirosaki Domain|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q903555}} , and {{ill|Tonami|ja|斗南県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tonami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 会津藩|1=Aizu Domain|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4389944}} were merged to form {{ill|Hirosaki Prefecture|ja|弘前県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hirosaki Prefecture|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 青森県|1=Aomori Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q71699}} , thereby defining the modern boundaries of [[:en:Aomori Prefecture|Aomori]] .
== Births == * [[:en:Kōka|Kōka]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1846|1846]] [[:en:October 24|October 24]] ） – [[:en:Keijiro Amemiya|Amemiya Keijirō]] , an entrepreneur († [[:en:1911|1911]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 1st year/[[:en:Gentoku|Gentoku]] 3rd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1331|1331]] [[:en:October 7|October 7]] ） – {{ill|Ashikaga Sadatsuru|ja|足利貞氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Sadatsuru|1=Ashikaga Sadauji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11636829}} , a military commander (* [[:en:1273|1273]] ). * [[:en:Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 3rd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1557|1557]] [[:en:September 27|September 27]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Go-Nara|Go-Nara Tennō]] , the 105th emperor (* [[:en:1496|1496]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 7th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1836|1836]] [[:en:October 14|October 14]] ） – [[:en:Mogami Tokunai|Saijō Tokunai]] , an explorer of late Edo (* [[:en:1754|1754]] ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|4|9|6|8|5|10|9|0905|qq=}} {{cdo:9 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)|qq=}} {{zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)|qq=}} {{zh-yue:九月初五|qq=}} {{zh:九月初五|qq=}} {{cdo:9 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)|qq=}} {{zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)|qq=}} {{zh-yue:九月初五|qq=}} {{zh:九月初五|qq=}} {{cdo:9 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)|qq=}} {{zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)|qq=}} {{zh-yue:九月初五|qq=}} {{zh:九月初五|qq=}} ==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

, the era was changed from [[:en:Shōchō|Shōchō]] to [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] . * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1858|1858]] [[:en:October 11|October 11]] ） == Events == * {{ill|Yōmyō Tennō|ja|Emperor Yōmei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yōmyō Tennō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:585|585]] [[:en:October 3|October 3]] ） – The fourth son of [[:en:Emperor Kinmei|Kinmei Tennō]] , {{ill|Tachibana Toyohihi-no-ōji|ja|橘豊日皇子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tachibana Toyohihi-no-ōji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , ascended the throne as the 31st {{ill|Yōmyō Tennō|ja|Emperor Yōmei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yōmyō Tennō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} . * [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1429|1429]] [[:en:October 3|October 3]] ） – To mark the beginning of the reign of [[:en:Emperor Go-Hanazono|Go-Kagami Tennō]] , the era was changed from [[:en:Shōchō|Shōchō]] to [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] . * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1858|1858]] [[:en:October 11|October 11]] ） – The arrest of members of the {{ill|Sonzōha|ja|Sonnō jōi faction|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sonzōha|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} began as part of the [[:en:Ansei Purge|Ansei no Daigoku]] . * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ） – The prefectures of {{ill|Tateno|ja|館県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tateno|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 松前藩|1=Matsumae Domain|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q18669712}} , {{ill|Hirosaki|ja|弘前県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hirosaki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 青森県|1=Aomori Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q71699}} , {{ill|Shichinohe|ja|七戸県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shichinohe|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 七戸藩|1=Shichinohe Domain|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7884520}} , {{ill|Hachinohe|ja|八戸県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachinohe|1=Hachinohe|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11391207}} , {{ill|Kuroishi|ja|黒石県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuroishi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弘前藩|1=Hirosaki Domain|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q903555}} , and {{ill|Tonami|ja|斗南県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tonami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 会津藩|1=Aizu Domain|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4389944}} were merged to form {{ill|Hirosaki Prefecture|ja|弘前県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hirosaki Prefecture|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 青森県|1=Aomori Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q71699}} , thereby defining the modern boundaries of [[:en:Aomori Prefecture|Aomori]] .

[[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1429|1429]] [[:en:October 3|October 3]] ） – To mark the beginning of the reign of [[:en:Emperor Go-Hanazono|Go-Kagami Tennō]] , the era was changed from [[:en:Shōchō|Shōchō]] to [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] . * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1858|1858]] [[:en:October 11|October 11]] ） – The arrest of members of the {{ill|Sonzōha|ja|Sonnō jōi faction|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sonzōha|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} began as part of the [[:en:Ansei Purge|Ansei no Daigoku]] . * Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 5일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 5''' is the 5th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Yōmyō Tennō|ja|Emperor Yōmei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yōmyō Tennō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:585|585]] [[:en:October 3|October 3]] ） – The fourth son of [[:en:Emperor Kinmei|Kinmei Tennō]] , {{ill|Tachibana Toyohihi-no-ōji|ja|橘豊日皇子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tachibana Toyohihi-no-ōji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , ascended the throne as the 31st {{ill|Yōmyō Tennō|ja|Emperor Yōmei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yōmyō Tennō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} . * [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1429|1429]] [[:en:October 3|October 3]] ） – To mark the beginning of the reign of [[:en:Emperor Go-Hanazono|Go-Kagami Tennō]] , the era was changed from [[:en:Shōchō|Shōchō]] to [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] . * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1858|1858]] [[:en:October 11|October 11]] ） – The arrest of members of the {{ill|Sonzōha|ja|Sonnō jōi faction|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sonzōha|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} began as part of the [[:en:Ansei Purge|Ansei no Daigoku]] . * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ） – The prefectures of {{ill|Tateno|ja|館県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tateno|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 松前藩|1=Matsumae Domain|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q18669712}} , {{ill|Hirosaki|ja|弘前県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hirosaki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 青森県|1=Aomori Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q71699}} , {{ill|Shichinohe|ja|七戸県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shichinohe|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 七戸藩|1=Shichinohe Domain|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7884520}} , {{ill|Hachinohe|ja|八戸県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachinohe|1=Hachinohe|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11391207}} , {{ill|Kuroishi|ja|黒石県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuroishi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弘前藩|1=Hirosaki Domain|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q903555}} , and {{ill|Tonami|ja|斗南県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tonami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 会津藩|1=Aizu Domain|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4389944}} were merged to form {{ill|Hirosaki Prefecture|ja|弘前県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hirosaki Prefecture|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 青森県|1=Aomori Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q71699}} , thereby defining the modern boundaries of [[:en:Aomori Prefecture|Aomori]] .
== Births == * [[:en:Kōka|Kōka]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1846|1846]] [[:en:October 24|October 24]] ） – [[:en:Keijiro Amemiya|Amemiya Keijirō]] , an entrepreneur († [[:en:1911|1911]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 1st year/[[:en:Gentoku|Gentoku]] 3rd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1331|1331]] [[:en:October 7|October 7]] ） – {{ill|Ashikaga Sadatsuru|ja|足利貞氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Sadatsuru|1=Ashikaga Sadauji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11636829}} , a military commander (* [[:en:1273|1273]] ). * [[:en:Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 3rd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1557|1557]] [[:en:September 27|September 27]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Go-Nara|Go-Nara Tennō]] , the 105th emperor (* [[:en:1496|1496]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 7th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1836|1836]] [[:en:October 14|October 14]] ） – [[:en:Mogami Tokunai|Saijō Tokunai]] , an explorer of late Edo (* [[:en:1754|1754]] ).

== Events == * {{ill|Yōmyō Tennō|ja|Emperor Yōmei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yōmyō Tennō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:585|585]] [[:en:October 3|October 3]] ） – The fourth son of [[:en:Emperor Kinmei|Kinmei Tennō]] , {{ill|Tachibana Toyohihi-no-ōji|ja|橘豊日皇子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tachibana Toyohihi-no-ōji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , ascended the throne as the 31st {{ill|Yōmyō Tennō|ja|Emperor Yōmei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yōmyō Tennō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} . * [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1429|1429]] [[:en:October 3|October 3]] ） – To mark the beginning of the reign of [[:en:Emperor Go-Hanazono|Go-Kagami Tennō]] , the era was changed from [[:en:Shōchō|Shōchō]] to [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] . * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1858|1858]] [[:en:October 11|October 11]] ） – The arrest of members of the {{ill|Sonzōha|ja|Sonnō jōi faction|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sonzōha|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} began as part of the [[:en:Ansei Purge|Ansei no Daigoku]] . * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ） – The prefectures of {{ill|Tateno|ja|館県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tateno|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 松前藩|1=Matsumae Domain|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q18669712}} , {{ill|Hachinohe|ja|八戸県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachinohe|1=Hachinohe|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11391207}} , {{ill|Kuroishi|ja|黒石県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuroishi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弘前藩|1=Hirosaki Domain|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q903555}} , and {{ill|Tonami|ja|斗南県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tonami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 会津藩|1=Aizu Domain|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4389944}} were merged to form {{ill|Hirosaki Prefecture|ja|弘前県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hirosaki Prefecture|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 青森県|1=Aomori Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q71699}} , thereby defining the modern boundaries of [[:en:Aomori Prefecture|Aomori]] .
== Births == * [[:en:Kōka|Kōka]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1846|1846]] [[:en:October 24|October 24]] ） – [[:en:Keijiro Amemiya|Amemiya Keijirō]] , an entrepreneur († [[:en:1911|1911]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 1st year/[[:en:Gentoku|Gentoku]] 3rd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1331|1331]] [[:en:October 7|October 7]] ） – {{ill|Ashikaga Sadatsuru|ja|足利貞氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Sadatsuru|1=Ashikaga Sadauji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11636829}} , a military commander (* [[:en:1273|1273]] ). * [[:en:Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 3rd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1557|1557]] [[:en:September 27|September 27]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Go-Nara|Go-Nara Tennō]] , the 105th emperor (* [[:en:1496|1496]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 7th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1836|1836]] [[:en:October 14|October 14]] ） – [[:en:Mogami Tokunai|Saijō Tokunai]] , an explorer of late Edo (* [[:en:1754|1754]] ).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月5日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 5일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月初五]][[zh:九月初五]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月5日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 5일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月初五]][[zh:九月初五]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月5日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 5일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月初五]][[zh:九月初五]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840086]] Wikidata name: 5th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:14, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 5|qq=September 5}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 5일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 5''' is the 5th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Yōmyō Tennō|ja|Emperor Yōmei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yōmyō Tennō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|585|en|585|WD=Q32201|lt=585}} {{ill|October 3|en|October 3|WD=Q2931|lt=October 3}} ） – The fourth son of {{ill|Emperor Kinmei|en|Emperor Kinmei|WD=Q329792|lt=Kinmei Tennō}} , {{ill|Tachibana Toyohihi-no-ōji|ja|橘豊日皇子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tachibana Toyohihi-no-ōji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , ascended the throne as the 31st {{ill|Yōmyō Tennō|ja|Emperor Yōmei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yōmyō Tennō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} . * {{ill|Eikyō|en|Eikyō|WD=Q1193059|lt=Eikyō}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1429|en|1429|WD=Q6326|lt=1429}} {{ill|October 3|en|October 3|WD=Q2931|lt=October 3}} ） – To mark the beginning of the reign of {{ill|Emperor Go-Hanazono|en|Emperor Go-Hanazono|WD=Q451926|lt=Go-Kagami Tennō}} , the era was changed from {{ill|Shōchō|en|Shōchō|WD=Q1193070|lt=Shōchō}} to {{ill|Eikyō|en|Eikyō|WD=Q1193059|lt=Eikyō}} . * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|WD=Q1327259|lt=Ansei}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1858|en|1858|WD=Q7684|lt=1858}} {{ill|October 11|en|October 11|WD=Q2927|lt=October 11}} ） – The arrest of members of the {{ill|Sonzōha|ja|Sonnō jōi faction|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sonzōha|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} began as part of the {{ill|Ansei Purge|en|Ansei Purge|WD=Q569487|lt=Ansei no Daigoku}} . * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1871|en|1871|WD=Q7746|lt=1871}} {{ill|October 18|en|October 18|WD=Q2964|lt=October 18}} ） – The prefectures of {{ill|Tateno|ja|館県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tateno|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 松前藩|1=Matsumae Domain|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q18669712}} , {{ill|Hirosaki|ja|弘前県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hirosaki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 青森県|1=Aomori Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q71699}} , {{ill|Shichinohe|ja|七戸県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shichinohe|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 七戸藩|1=Shichinohe Domain|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7884520}} , {{ill|Hachinohe|ja|八戸県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachinohe|1=Hachinohe|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11391207}} , {{ill|Kuroishi|ja|黒石県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuroishi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弘前藩|1=Hirosaki Domain|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q903555}} , and {{ill|Tonami|ja|斗南県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tonami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 会津藩|1=Aizu Domain|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4389944}} were merged to form {{ill|Hirosaki Prefecture|ja|弘前県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hirosaki Prefecture|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 青森県|1=Aomori Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q71699}} , thereby defining the modern boundaries of {{ill|Aomori Prefecture|en|Aomori Prefecture|WD=Q71699|lt=Aomori}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Kōka|en|Kōka|WD=Q1325317|lt=Kōka}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1846|en|1846|WD=Q7640|lt=1846}} {{ill|October 24|en|October 24|WD=Q2955|lt=October 24}} ） – {{ill|Keijiro Amemiya|en|Keijiro Amemiya|WD=Q4064668|lt=Amemiya Keijirō}} , an entrepreneur († {{ill|1911|en|1911|WD=Q2076|lt=1911}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Genkō (1331–1334)|en|Genkō (1331–1334)|WD=Q1194556|lt=Genkō}} 1st year/{{ill|Gentoku|en|Gentoku|WD=Q1327385|lt=Gentoku}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1331|en|1331|WD=Q6000|lt=1331}} {{ill|October 7|en|October 7|WD=Q2926|lt=October 7}} ） – {{ill|Ashikaga Sadatsuru|ja|足利貞氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Sadatsuru|1=Ashikaga Sadauji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11636829}} , a military commander (* {{ill|1273|en|1273|WD=Q5526|lt=1273}} ). * {{ill|Kōji (Muromachi period)|en|Kōji (Muromachi period)|WD=Q1143910|lt=Kōji}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1557|en|1557|WD=Q6595|lt=1557}} {{ill|September 27|en|September 27|WD=Q2884|lt=September 27}} ） – {{ill|Emperor Go-Nara|en|Emperor Go-Nara|WD=Q349467|lt=Go-Nara Tennō}} , the 105th emperor (* {{ill|1496|en|1496|WD=Q6699|lt=1496}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō}} 7th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1836|en|1836|WD=Q7601|lt=1836}} {{ill|October 14|en|October 14|WD=Q2922|lt=October 14}} ） – {{ill|Mogami Tokunai|en|Mogami Tokunai|WD=Q4141812|lt=Saijō Tokunai}} , an explorer of late Edo (* {{ill|1754|en|1754|WD=Q7623|lt=1754}} ).
== See Also ==

calendar}} {{ill|585|en|585|WD=Q32201|lt=585}} {{ill|October 3|en|October 3|WD=Q2931|lt=October 3}} ） – The fourth son of {{ill|Emperor Kinmei|en|Emperor Kinmei|WD=Q329792|lt=Kinmei Tennō}} , {{ill|Tachibana Toyohihi-no-ōji|ja|橘豊日皇子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tachibana Toyohihi-no-ōji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , ascended the throne as the 31st {{ill|Yōmyō Tennō|ja|Emperor calendar}} {{ill|1429|en|1429|WD=Q6326|lt=1429}} {{ill|October 3|en|October 3|WD=Q2931|lt=October 3}} ） – To mark the beginning of the reign of {{ill|Emperor Go-Hanazono|en|Emperor Purge|en|Ansei Purge|WD=Q569487|lt=Ansei no Daigoku}} . * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1871|en|1871|WD=Q7746|lt=1871}} {{ill|October 18|en|October 18|WD=Q2964|lt=October 18}} ） – The prefectures of {{ill|Tateno|ja|館県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tateno|ja_comment=jawiki
